label: pypdf
no_hpc_disk_backend: none needed; PDF text extraction runs where the trusted PDF already lives
notes: No OCR model. Use only for born-digital PDFs with embedded text.

label: docling
notes: Fallback OCR engine. The tunnel path POSTs PDFs to docling-serve and receives Markdown; no PDF/output bytes persist on HPC disk.

label: olmOCR-2
notes: VLM OCR engine. Local model: mlx-community/olmOCR-2-7B-1025-4bit. HPC model: allenai/olmOCR-2-7B-1025.

label: DeepSeek-OCR-2
notes: VLM OCR engine. Local model default: mlx-community/DeepSeek-OCR-2-bf16. HPC model: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-OCR-2.

label: GLM-OCR
notes: VLM OCR engine. Local model: mlx-community/GLM-OCR-8bit. HPC model: zai-org/GLM-OCR.

label: Baidu Unlimited-OCR
notes: SGLang-only OCR engine. HPC model: baidu/Unlimited-OCR.
